visual_description: A man in a suit rides a bicycle on a paved road, gesturing with his right hand while looking ahead. A white Jeep drives alongside him, its driver visible through the window and the vehicle’s front grille prominent. The background features rolling hills and a clear sky under bright daylight.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a neutral tone, speaking at a moderate pace with no noticeable inflection.
